summary: Invoice/accounting app with GST calculation features deployed on Internet Computer blockchain. User wants more precise GST calculations.
architectural_notes: App is deployed on Internet Computer blockchain (canister-based); data persists across code updates
known_issues: GST calculation lacks sufficient precision — needs improvement

existing_features.title: Improve GST calculation precision in the frontend gstUtils.ts utility to exactly mirror the updated backend logic. Ensure all per-line-item and full-invoice GST summary calculations use integer paise arithmetic throughout, rounding only at the final display step. The frontend computed totals must match backend-stored values exactly.

new_feature_requests.summary: Improve GST calculation precision in the backend Motoko actor to eliminate rounding errors. Use high-precision integer arithmetic (paise-level) throughout all GST computation steps — including CGST, SGST, and IGST — ensuring that intermediate values are never truncated or rounded prematurely. Final amounts should only be rounded at the very last step before storage.
